title: Workflow — full pre-release dependency audit with upgrade plan
code_snippet:
# User request: 'We are releasing v2.0 next week. Run a full dependency audit.'
# go.mod: 15 direct deps, 62 indirect deps
# Go version: 1.21
# govulncheck, go-licenses available
expected_feedback: Workflow: Standard depth — pre-release audit. (1) Gate 1: go.mod parsed, 15 direct + 62 indirect modules. (2) Gate 2: govulncheck and go-licenses available. (3) Gate 3: go mod verify passes, go mod tidy clean. (4) CVE scan: govulncheck ./... (5) License scan: go-licenses check (6) Outdated report: go list -m -u all (7) Supply chain: GOPROXY + GOPRIVATE config review. (8) Scorecard: Critical 3/3, Standard 4/5, Hygiene 3/4 = PASS. (9) Upgrade plan: prioritized by severity.
